zh.lifeSummary: 當Friedrich III von Leiningen於大約1212年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 巴德 迪可海姆阿爾特萊寧根時，他的父親Friedrich I von Saarbrücken27歲，母親Agnes Countess of Eberstein29歲。他於1242年之前與Adelheid von Kyburg結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1287年在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 巴德 迪可海姆阿爾特萊寧根賀寧根享年76歲，埋葬在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 巴德 迪可海姆阿爾特萊寧根賀寧根。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Friedrich III von Leiningen于大约1212年出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 巴德 迪可海姆阿爾特萊寧根时，他的父亲Friedrich I von Saarbrücken27岁，母亲Agnes Countess of Eberstein29岁。他于1242年之前与Adelheid von Kyburg结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1287年在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 巴德 迪可海姆阿爾特萊寧根賀寧根享年76岁，埋葬在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 巴德 迪可海姆阿爾特萊寧根賀寧根。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Leiningen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from any of several places called Leiningen.

nameMeanings.name: Friedrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

variants.name: Frederick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

variants.name: Friederich
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Friedrich III von Leiningen was born about 1212, in Altleiningen, Bad Dürkheim, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, his father, Friedrich I von Saarbrücken, was 27 and his mother, Agnes Countess of Eberstein, was 29. He married Adelheid von Kyburg before 1242. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1287, in Höningen, Altleiningen, Bad Dürkheim, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 76, and was buried in Höningen, Altleiningen, Bad Dürkheim, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Friedrich III von Leiningen est né environ 1212, à Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Friedrich I von Saarbrücken, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Agnes Countess of Eberstein, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Adelheid von Kyburg avant 1242. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1287, à Höningen, Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Höningen, Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Friedrich III von Leiningen um 1212 in Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Friedrich I von Saarbrücken 27 und seine Mutter Agnes Countess of Eberstein 29. Er hat vor 1242 Adelheid von Kyburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1287 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Höningen, Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland und wurde in Höningen, Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich III von Leiningen è nato il circa 1212 nel Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, il suo padre, Friedrich I von Saarbrücken, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Countess of Eberstein, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Adelheid von Kyburg prima del 1242. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1287, nel Höningen, Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Höningen, Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Friedrich III von Leiningenが約1212年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス バド ドuルクヘイムアルトレイニンジェンで生まれた時，父Friedrich I von Saarbrückenは27歳，母Agnes Countess of Ebersteinは29歳であった。1242年以前にAdelheid von Kyburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1287年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス バド ドuルクヘイムアルトレイニンジェンhoニンジェンで76歳で死去し，ドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス バド ドuルクヘイムアルトレイニンジェンhoニンジェンにて埋葬された。

ko.Of, Alt-Leiningen, Pfalz, Bavaria: 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 바드 드u르케임 알틀레이닝
ko.Höningen, Altleiningen, Bad Dürkheim, Pa: 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 바드 드u르케임 알틀레이닝 ho닝
ko.lifeSummary: Friedrich III von Leiningen(이)가 대략 1212년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 바드 드u르케임 알틀레이닝에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Friedrich I von Saarbrücken(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Countess of Eberstein(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1242년 이전 Adelheid von Kyburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1287년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 바드 드u르케임 알틀레이닝 ho닝에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 바드 드u르케임 알틀레이닝 ho닝에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich III von Leiningen nasceu aproximadamente 1212, em Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Friedrich I von Saarbrücken, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Countess of Eberstein, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelheid von Kyburg antes 1242. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1287, em Höningen, Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Höningen, Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha.

ru.Höningen, Altleiningen, Bad Dürkheim, Pa: хoнинген, алтлининген, ландкрис бад дuрхим, раинланд-пфалз, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Friedrich III von Leiningen родился около 1212 г. в местности алтлининген, ландкрис бад дuрхим, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, его отцу по имени Friedrich I von Saarbrücken было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Countess of Eberstein, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelheid von Kyburg перед 1242 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1287 г. в местности хoнинген, алтлининген, ландкрис бад дuрхим, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности хoнинген, алтлининген, ландкрис бад дuрхим, раинланд-пфалз, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Friedrich III von Leiningen nació aproximadamente 1212, en Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, su papá, Friedrich I von Saarbrücken, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Agnes Countess of Eberstein, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Adelheid von Kyburg antes de 1242. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1287, en Höningen, Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Höningen, Altleiningen, Landkreis Bad Dürkheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania.
